title: Number System
content: Natural numbers: 1, 2, 3... (counting numbers). Whole numbers: 0, 1, 2, 3... (natural + zero). Integers: ...-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3... (positive and negative). Rational numbers: can be written as p/q (fractions, decimals). Irrational numbers: cannot be written as fraction (√2, π). Real numbers: all rational + irrational. Prime numbers: divisible only by 1 and itself (2,3,5,7,11...). Composite numbers: have more than 2 factors. Even numbers: divisible by 2. Odd numbers: not divisible by 2.

title: Fractions and Decimals
content: Fraction = numerator/denominator. Proper fraction: numerator < denominator (3/4). Improper fraction: numerator > denominator (7/4). Mixed number: whole + fraction (1¾). To add fractions: find LCM of denominators. To multiply: multiply numerators and denominators. To divide: multiply by reciprocal. Decimal to fraction: 0.25 = 25/100 = 1/4. Percentage: fraction × 100. Example: 3/4 = 0.75 = 75%.

title: Algebra Basics
content: Variable: letter representing unknown value (x, y). Expression: combination of numbers and variables (3x + 5). Equation: expression with equals sign (3x + 5 = 20). Solving: isolate variable. Linear equation: ax + b = 0, solution x = -b/a. Quadratic equation: ax² + bx + c = 0, solutions x = [-b ± √(b²-4ac)] / 2a. Identities: (a+b)² = a² + 2ab + b². (a-b)² = a² - 2ab + b². (a+b)(a-b) = a² - b². (a+b)³ = a³ + 3a²b + 3ab² + b³.

title: Triangles
content: Triangle: 3-sided polygon. Sum of angles = 180°. Types by sides: Equilateral (all equal, 60° each), Isosceles (two equal), Scalene (all different). Types by angles: Acute (all < 90°), Right (one = 90°), Obtuse (one > 90°). Area = ½ × base × height. Heron's formula: Area = √[s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)] where s = (a+b+c)/2. Pythagoras theorem (right triangle): hypotenuse² = base² + perpendicular² (c² = a² + b²). Common triplets: (3,4,5), (5,12,13), (8,15,17).

title: Circles
content: Circle: set of points equidistant from center. Radius (r): center to edge. Diameter (d) = 2r. Circumference = 2πr = πd. Area = πr². π ≈ 3.14159 or 22/7. Chord: line segment within circle. Diameter is longest chord. Arc: part of circumference. Sector: pizza-slice shape, area = (θ/360) × πr². Segment: area between chord and arc. Tangent: line touching circle at one point, perpendicular to radius. Two tangents from external point are equal in length.

title: Area and Volume Formulas
content: Rectangle: Area = l×b, Perimeter = 2(l+b). Square: Area = a², Perimeter = 4a. Triangle: Area = ½×b×h. Circle: Area = πr², Circumference = 2πr. Parallelogram: Area = b×h. Trapezium: Area = ½(a+b)×h. Cube: Volume = a³, Surface = 6a². Cuboid: Volume = l×b×h, Surface = 2(lb+bh+lh). Cylinder: Volume = πr²h, Surface = 2πr(r+h). Cone: Volume = ⅓πr²h, Slant surface = πrl. Sphere: Volume = 4/3πr³, Surface = 4πr².

title: Trigonometry Basics
content: Trigonometry deals with ratios in right triangles. sin(θ) = opposite/hypotenuse. cos(θ) = adjacent/hypotenuse. tan(θ) = opposite/adjacent = sin/cos. Reciprocals: cosec = 1/sin, sec = 1/cos, cot = 1/tan. Key values: sin 0°=0, sin 30°=½, sin 45°=1/√2, sin 60°=√3/2, sin 90°=1. sin²θ + cos²θ = 1. 1 + tan²θ = sec²θ. 1 + cot²θ = cosec²θ. Applications: finding heights of buildings, towers, distances.

title: Statistics and Probability
content: Mean (average) = sum of values / number of values. Median: middle value when arranged in order. Mode: most frequently occurring value. Range = highest - lowest value. Probability = favorable outcomes / total outcomes. P(event) ranges from 0 (impossible) to 1 (certain). P(A') = 1 - P(A) [complement]. For a coin: P(heads) = 1/2. For a die: P(any number) = 1/6. For a deck: P(ace) = 4/52 = 1/13. Standard deviation measures data spread from mean.

title: Percentage, Profit and Loss
content: Percentage = (part/whole) × 100. Profit = Selling Price - Cost Price. Loss = Cost Price - Selling Price. Profit% = (Profit/CP) × 100. Loss% = (Loss/CP) × 100. SP = CP × (100+P%)/100 [for profit]. SP = CP × (100-L%)/100 [for loss]. Discount = Marked Price - Selling Price. Discount% = (Discount/MP) × 100. Simple Interest = P×R×T/100. Compound Interest: A = P(1+R/100)ⁿ. CI = A - P.

title: Ratio, Proportion and Speed
content: Ratio: comparison of two quantities (a:b). Proportion: two equal ratios (a:b = c:d, then ad = bc). Speed = Distance/Time. Time = Distance/Speed. Distance = Speed × Time. Average speed = Total distance / Total time. Relative speed (same direction) = difference of speeds. Relative speed (opposite direction) = sum of speeds. Train problems: add train length to distance. If speed in km/h, multiply by 5/18 to get m/s. Work problems: If A does work in 'a' days, rate = 1/a per day.
